supply_chain.dependencies: We purchase electronic device components from a variety of suppliers and use several contract manufacturers. We enter into agreements with contract manufacturers and suppliers for certain electronic device components with non-cancellable purchase commitments based on forecasted customer demand.
supply_chain.risks: Constrained labor markets increase payroll costs. We rely on a limited number of shipping companies to deliver inventory and completed orders. China-based sellers account for significant portions of third-party seller services and advertising revenues, and China-based suppliers provide significant portions of components and finished goods. Regulatory and trade restrictions, data protection and cybersecurity laws, economic factors, geopolitical events, or security issues negatively impacting China-based sellers and suppliers could adversely affect operating results.

regulatory_risks: Government regulation of internet, IT infrastructure, data centers, retail, delivery, and other sectors
Internet content restrictions
Sale of media and other products and services restrictions
Foreign investment restrictions in China and India
PRC and India regulatory licensing and cybersecurity requirements
Data protection and cybersecurity laws (including GDPR)
Privacy, data use, data protection, data security, data localization, network security regulations
Consumer protection laws
Payments regulations and compliance requirements
Tax laws and regulations changes (including global minimum taxes)
Competition and antitrust regulations
Advertising regulations
Product labeling requirements
Healthcare regulations
Environmental and climate-related regulations
Trade protection measures, export duties, quotas, custom duties and tariffs
Restrictions on import and export of certain products, technologies, and components
Business licensing and certification requirements
Sanctions compliance
U.S. Foreign Corrupt Practices Act compliance
Electronic device certification requirements
Electronic waste regulations
Unmanned aircraft systems (drones) commercial operation regulations
Works councils and labor union regulations
Income tax regulations and audits in multiple jurisdictions

sanction_risks: Restrictive governmental actions including trade protection measures and sanctions
Regulatory and trade restrictions impacting China-based sellers and suppliers
Geopolitical events including war and terrorism
Armed hostilities and political conflicts including those involving China
